description_long: This is a white slip-on shoe with a thick, platform-style sole and a ribbed or pleated texture covering the upper. The shoe features a low-cut design with elastic side gores for easy wearing and removal, and the interior appears to be lightly padded for comfort. The upper material has a uniform, matte finish, and the sole is constructed from a solid, slightly textured material. The heel and toe are rounded, and the shoe lacks any visible branding or decorative elements. The overall silhouette is modern and minimalistic, suitable for casual urban wear. The shoe appears to be in pristine, unworn condition with no visible scuffs or dirt.
description: A white, ribbed slip-on shoe with a thick platform sole and a minimal, modern design. The shoe is clean, unbranded, and in new condition.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded toe, ribbed upper texture, and the thick, layered sole.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the low-cut slip-on profile, ribbed upper, and the platform sole's horizontal lines.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the rounded heel, ribbed texture wrapping around the back, and the open, padded interior.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the ribbed upper, elastic gore, and the platform sole.
